exampleTr: Şehir yerine kırsal yaşamı tercih ediyor.

exampleEn: The commercial district is very busy.

exampleTr: Şehirde daha fazla yeşil alan gerekiyor.

exampleEn: The city is known for its unique architecture.

exampleEn: In some markets, barter is still used.

exampleEn: The bag was counterfeit, not an original.

exampleEn: She used a coupon for 10% off.

exampleEn: The intern worked in the marketing department.

exampleEn: The craftsman made a beautiful table.

exampleEn: The logistician coordinated the supply chain.

exampleTr: Yurt dışında çalışmak için akademik burs aldı.

exampleEn: He submitted his dissertation last week.

exampleEn: Read the syllabus before the first class.
exampleTr: İlk dersten önce ders programını oku.

exampleEn: Make sure the institution is accredited.

exampleTr: Program öğrencileri ilk yardım konusunda sertifikalandırır.

exampleEn: Students can choose any elective they like.

exampleTr: Sanitasyon, halk sağlığı için hayati önem taşır.

exampleEn: Many diseases are preventable with vaccines.

exampleEn: The cardiologist reviewed his heart results.

exampleTr: Bu ilaç için reçeteye ihtiyacınız var.

exampleEn: An outbreak of flu swept through the school.
Mental health is as important as physical health.
exampleTr: Ruh sağlığı, fiziksel sağlık kadar önemlidir.

exampleEn: Doping is banned in all professional sports.

exampleEn: She has great stamina for a long race.

exampleEn: The system is scalable to millions of users.
